changeSet.author: thanh
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE sugar_advisor.products ( id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), name VARCHAR(255), brand VARCHAR(255), barcode VARCHAR(50), sugar_per_100g DECIMAL(6,2), ingredients TEXT, source VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW() );
ALTER TABLE sugar_advisor.products ADD CONSTRAINT uq_products_barcode UNIQUE (barcode);
